commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Earth is superfluous. (St. Jerome, ad Sun.) (Calmet)
Yet it is found in the Vatican Septuagint (Haydock)
The kings of the earth assembled against the Church, (Psalm ii. 2.) as many came to oppose Jerusalem, under Cambyses, Ezechiel xxxviii. 2, 13. (Calmet)
